query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A close-up photograph of a person wearing thin wire-framed glasses with eyes closed and mouth slightly open showing teeth, visible from just below the hairline to the chin, illuminated by red light against a dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A casually composed, snapshot-style close-up aggressively crops a person's face at the forehead and sides, wearing thin wire-framed glasses with eyes squeezed shut and mouth open in an expression of discomfort. An overpowering sickly red cast washes over the entire scene, shifting skin tones into a single unhealthy hue and surrounding the face with deep shadow, lending the image an unsettling, raw vernacular energy.
